name: wanxiangshu
description: Wanxiangshu.Next Structured Flow runtime compiled via Fable

scripts.build: dotnet fable precompile next/Wanxiangshu.Next.fsproj -o build/next && node scripts/postbuild.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && cd tests-next && dotnet fable Wanxiangshu.Next.Tests.fsproj --outDir ../build/tests-next --precompiledLib ../build/next && node --test runner.test.mjs && node runner.js && cd .. && node testkit/opencode/tests/gate-testkit.mjs
scripts.test:release: npm run build && npm test && npm run test:e2e:p0
